title: F1 Zoom
description: Simple: if that's what you're looking for in a zoom mod, then go *zoom*.
body:
# F1
### It *zooms* (Like an F1 car, just in case ya didn't catch that)

This is a dead simple mod. Press a key (C) to zoom. Scroll to adjust.

If you do not need more than that, this mod is perfect. Else: [zume](https://modrinth.com/mod/zume).
